message:
fix: harden bakeoff latency calculation, fix timestamp initialization, clean up redundant assignments

Bakeoff evaluation (src/bakeoff.rs):
- Guarantee at least 1 timing iteration via .max(1) to prevent division
  by zero when config.timing_iterations is 0
- Pre-allocate query_latencies vec with known capacity
- Remove now-impossible empty-vec guard since iterations >= 1 is enforced

HTML export timestamp fix (src/html_export/renderer.rs):
- Initialize end_timestamp from primary.timestamp before moving primary
  into the struct, fixing a clone-after-move issue where start_timestamp
  was cloned to initialize end_timestamp
- Both start and end timestamps now correctly capture the primary
  message's timestamp at group creation time

Message grouping cleanup (src/lib.rs):
- Remove redundant manual timestamp assignments in group_messages_for_export
  for user, assistant, tool-only, and system message groups
- The MessageGroup constructors (::user, ::assistant, ::tool_only, ::system)
  already initialize timestamps correctly via MessageGroup::new, so the
  manual overrides were unnecessary double-writes

Formatting (src/html_export/scripts.rs):
- Apply rustfmt to multi-line assert in popover toggle test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
